case_title: MILLIE WEBB VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
OBJECTION AND JURY TRIAL DEMAND FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB, MILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-06-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-22-2013
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JAN-06-2014. NOV-06-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF CARLING, DUNCAN ON DEC-23-2013 THROUGH JAN-03-2014 FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR SUSAN MARIE KEENEY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-17-2014 THROUGH APR-17-2014.
DECLARATION OF P&A IN SUPPORT OF STIP AND ORDER TO EXTEND THE ARB JURISDICTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB, MILLIE
FEE PAID ON STIP AND ORDER TO EXTEND THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION BEYOND NINETY DAYS FROM APPOINTMENT OF ARB TO 07/16/2014 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB, MILLIE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-19-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR AUG-19-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. MAR-03-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JAN-16-2014.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR VALERIE JAN HIGGINS.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN EDWARD HILL.
ORDER AND STIPULATION TO EXTEND ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO JUL-16-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB, MILLIE
